@graph.name: Audit Services in Jammu and Kashmir | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Audit Services in Jammu and Kashmir. From ₹25,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit. Contact +91 99622

acceptedAnswer.text: All companies registered under Companies Act must get audited annually. LLPs with turnover >₹40L or capital >₹25L also require audit.
Tax audit is required when business turnover exceeds ₹1 crore (₹10 crore if cash transactions <5%) or professional receipts exceed ₹50 lakhs.

mainEntity.name: How long does an audit take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on company size. We provide a detailed timeline at engagement stage.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide audit services services in Jammu and Kashmir?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Jammu and Kashmir from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Jammu and Kashmir?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Jammu and Kashmir fall under ROC Jammu. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Jammu and Kashmir-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Jammu and Kashmir?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Jammu and Kashmir: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
